name: Awesome Task Manager

releases.author: chefrocker
releases.description:
Fixed Obsidian review bot findings:
- Converted hardcoded UI strings to i18n translations (sentence case compliance)
- Replaced date format labels and placeholders with translation keys
- Added missing i18n entries for German and English
- Cleaned up source code formatting

Ready for Obsidian plugin registry submission.
releases.name: Obsidian Review Compliance Fix

releases.author: chefrocker
releases.description:
This release finalizes the requirements from the Obsidian plugin review (PR #11303).

Changes:

UI Consistency: Standardized all English localization strings to Sentence case as per Obsidian developer guidelines.
Directive Documentation: Added descriptions to all ESLint disable directives to ensure transparent code quality rules.
Serialization Fix: Improved YAML/Frontmatter serialization to prevent [object Object] output by using robust stringification and explicit Date object handling.
Version Bump: Updated plugin version to 1.0.4 for the next review cycle.
releases.name: Release 1.0.4: Final compliance fixes for UI strings and code directives

releases.author: chefrocker
releases.description:
This update focuses on compliance with the official Obsidian plugin guidelines and addresses several issues flagged during the automated review process.


Changes:



UI improvements: Corrected naming conventions for placeholders (sentence case) to comply with Obsidian design guidelines.
Stability & Data Security: Optimized the storage logic in 



FileStorage.ts

. Fixed potential issues with string serialization of objects to ensure clean storage in Markdown files.
Code Quality: Removal of redundant type assignments and resolution of TypeScript warnings.
Version Bump: Official update to v1.0.3 in preparation for the next automated code review.
releases.name: v1.0.3 – Obsidian Review Compliance & Code Quality Fixes

releases.author: chefrocker
releases.description:
Awesome Task Manager v1.0.1

This version includes extensive improvements to code quality and stability, based on valuable feedback from the Obsidian Review Team (PR #11303). The plugin now complies with the official developer guidelines.

Key changes:
Improved code compliance:
All console.log calls have been replaced with console.debug.
Direct style manipulations on the DOM have been replaced with CSS classes (theme-friendly).
The user interface has been converted to ‘sentence case’ in accordance with Obsidian standards.

Stability & Security:
The onunload method has been synchronised and the incorrect detachment of workspace leaves has been corrected.
All asynchronous operations (Promises) are now handled correctly.
Deleting files now uses `trashFile()` instead of `delete()` to respect user settings.

Type safety & maintainability:
Comprehensive refactoring to eliminate `any` types.
Removal of unused variables, imports and redundant code.
Dependencies updated and build process successfully validated.

Documentation:

A new ‘GitHub Feedback Guide’ has been added to ensure future compliance.
releases.name: Release 1.0.1: Refinement and compliance with Obsidian plugin guidelines

releases.author: chefrocker
releases.description:
# 🎉 Awesome Task Manager v1.0.0 – Initial Release

A full-featured visual task manager plugin for Obsidian. Manage your tasks directly inside your vault with a powerful dashboard, inline editing, and markdown-based storage.

---

## ✨ Features

### 📊 Dashboard
- **4-Tab Navigation:** Due Today & Overdue | Due This Week | All Open Tasks | All Tasks
- Sortable task table with priority and due date ordering
- Real-time filter by **Tag**, **Priority**, and **Category**
- Full-text search across all task fields

### ✏️ Inline Editing
- Edit **Priority**, **Status**, and **% Complete** directly in the table
- Add and remove **Tags** with autocomplete suggestions
- Percent slider with color-coded progress indicators

### 📝 Task Properties
- **Task name** (required) and **Category**
- **Priority:** Highest, High, Normal, Low
- **Status:** Open, In Progress, Completed (with automatic logic)
- **Start date**, **Due date**, **Completion date**
- **Progress:** 0–100% with 5% steps
- **Tags:** Multiple tags with persistent autocomplete
- **Link:** External URL with clickable preview
- **Images:** Upload and attach multiple images
- **Notes:** Full markdown support

### 🔄 Automatic Logic (A–D)
- **A:** Setting status to "Completed" → auto-sets 100% + completion date
- **B:** Setting 100% → auto-sets status to "Completed" + completion date
- **C:** Open task + progress > 0% → auto-sets status to "In Progress"
- **D:** Reducing from 100% → auto-sets status to "In Progress" + clears completion date

### 🔁 Recurring Tasks
- Intervals: Daily, Weekly, Monthly, Yearly, Custom
- Automatically creates a new task when a recurring task is completed
- Configurable interval value (e.g., every 3 days, every 2 weeks)

### 🔔 Reminders
- Options: 1 Day Before, Same Day, 1 Hour Before, Custom (minutes)
- Background check every 60 seconds
- Obsidian notification popups

### 📋 Daily Summary
- Automatic popup when opening Obsidian (once per day)
- Shows overdue tasks and tasks due today
- Can be disabled in settings

### 📤 Excel Export
- One-click copy to clipboard in Excel-compatible tab-separated format
- Includes all task fields

### 🌍 Multilingual
- **German (Deutsch)** – full support
- **English** – full support
- Switchable in settings

### ⚙️ Settings
- Custom task folder and image folder paths
- Default priority and default tab
- Date format: `dd.MM.yyyy` or `yyyy-MM-dd`
- Tag management: rename and delete tags
- Daily summary toggle

### 💾 Storage
- Tasks are stored as **Markdown files** with YAML frontmatter
- Fully readable and editable outside the plugin
- Images stored in configurable attachment folder
- Tags persisted in `.awesome-tasks/tags.json`

---

## 📦 Installation

### Manual Installation
1. Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` from this release
2. Create folder: `YourVault/.obsidian/plugins/awesome-task-manager/`
3. Copy the 3 files into that folder
4. Open Obsidian → Settings → Community Plugins → Enable "Awesome Task Manager"
5. Click the ✅ icon in the sidebar

---

## 🖥️ Compatibility
- Obsidian Desktop: ✅
- Obsidian Mobile: ✅
- Minimum Obsidian version: 1.0.0

---

## 👤 Author
**Sandro Ballarini** – [@chefrocker](https://github.com/chefrocker)

---

MIT

[manifest.json](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/26181834/manifest.json)
[styles.css](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/26181835/styles.css)
releases.name: v1.0.0 – Initial Release
